title: Rename nie→agora throughout source
description: Replace all remaining 'nie' identifiers (type names, constants, string literals, log messages, test names, CLI help text) with 'agora' equivalents. Covers: rpc_methods constants (e.g. NIE_VERSION), error code names, protocol string literals in ws.rs and protocol.rs, CLI binary name in help text, any remaining nie_ prefixes in identifiers, and .env example files.
